note: Created tcp_open_bind_listen_accept.rs with 15 tests (5 from common harness): 8 SocketManager-level tests (create, listen on any/specific address, multiple ports, SYN injection accept, SYN-ACK verification, custom buffers, close+cleanup) and 7 FFI-level tests (listen any/specific addr, distinct fds, accept WOULD_BLOCK, invalid fd, close-then-accept, full cycle). All pass.
